final_prompt.prompt:
Create an Instagram-style photo of a Korean cafe scene with fashion coffee and dessert, annotated with hand-drawn Japanese doodles and notes (all in-image text in Japanese).

Style/medium: needs a Korean cafe aesthetic with smartphone photo realism and hand-drawn white ink annotations — exact photo quality and line weight are yours
Composition: must be Instagram-friendly framing with annotated elements scattered across the image, arrows and dotted lines guiding the eye
Subject: must include Korean cafe style coffee drink and dessert as focal points, no people
Scene/backdrop: must include Korean cafe interior setting
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, airy cafe atmosphere with natural light — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, muted Korean cafe aesthetic — exact tones are yours
Materials/textures: needs a smartphone photo texture with rough, slightly uneven white ink hand-drawn lines overlay — exact line quality is yours
Text (verbatim): must include Japanese handwritten annotations (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji) as short diary-style comments:
  - 飲み物コメント例：さっぱり、優しい甘み
  - 食べ物コメント例：しっとり、最高
  - 空間コメント例：リラックス、素敵な時間
  - 全体コメント例：幸せすぎる〜
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Japanese by default; must preserve hand-drawn white ink line style, one-stroke rough uneven quality, outline tracing around objects, arrow/dotted line eye guidance, decorative elements (steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoticons) with留白 (blank space), Instagram story / magazine rough note aesthetic
Avoid: must avoid overly dense decorations, must avoid losing the casual fashionable mood
